text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, as I'm walking by the river...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Tch... Did I mess up the equation? No,<n>there's no
way. That must mean it's<n>the data that's...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
What do you want? This has got<n>nothing to do
with—

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Actually... the problem might be that I<n>don't have
enough data. Hey, get<n>your ass over here. I've
got a<n>question for you.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I'm doing some simulations based on<n>my heart
rate data, but I'm not getting<n>the results I want.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur proceeds to expand on her<n>
mathematical formulas in great detail,<n>but it all
goes over my head...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, forget it. I'm giving up on this<n>approach. It's
no good.
choice_data_list: Maybe you should redo the formulas?
But good things come to those who persist.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, no crap. What else do you think<n>I was
going to do? That's what I<n>meant by giving up on
this approach.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Just because I can't prove my<n>formula doesn't
mean I'm gonna<n>leave it half-finished.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Obviously, I'm not gonna bury my<n>head in the
sand if it still doesn't work<n>after that, but I know
my math's good,<n>so I'm not giving up yet. Later.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur changes gears in a flash<n>and walks
off, her tablet in hand. I<n>have no doubt that her
persistence will<n>get her the results she wants.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Are you saying I haven't tested<n>my math
enough times? I've<n>crunched the numbers more
times<n>than you can believe.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Besides, blindly chasing after resultsjust because you think there's apossibility something might come outof it is stu—

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Wait... Maybe the conditions I applied<n>to my trials
weren't thorough enough.<n>I should input the data
and run the<n>numbers again...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I watch Air Shakur for a while after<n>that, and her
formula seems to<n>produce a satisfactory answer
in the<n>end.
